title: Flesh on glass
creator_credit: Ann Turner, Lucy MacLaren and Swinburne Institute of Technology. Film and Television School
brief_description: Kate’s love for her brother’s wife and the ensuing feelings of guilt lead her to an obsession with the supernatural. We follow her struggle towards self-awareness.
